title: rosa canina var. fallens
intro: Rosa canina var. fallens, also known as the drooping dog rose, is a variety of rose species that is characterized by its drooping or pendulous branches and fragrant flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in vitamins C and A, as well as anthocyanins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. fallens include supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, flu, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. fallens include infusions, tinctures, and rose petal tea, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
